title: TFC Cast Iron Grill
description: Cast iron grill addon for TFC.
body:
This mod adds a cast iron grill for [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft).

It has 2 slots instead of 5, works completely the same as the wrought iron counterpart otherwise.

If you have [Firmalife](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmalife) installed, the cast iron grill can also be used as an oven appliance.
